meta.title: Sado City Daira Ski Resort
meta.description: A hidden powder snow adventure accessed via a defense road on Japan's historical island.

hero.eyebrow: Sado Island, Niigata · The island's only ski hill
hero.title:
Daira
Ski Resort
hero.tagline: Sado Island's only ski area—reach it via a JASDF defense road for a one-of-a-kind snow adventure.

quality.title:
Small hill,
big story.
quality.lead: Only 30 m of vertical yet five varied courses. Island powder and Sea of Japan views toward Mt. Kinpoku—snow play you cannot find at mainland mega-resorts.
quality.imgAlt: Family skiing powder snow on Sado Island

primary.title: Defense road access
primary.lead: Reach the hill via an Air Self-Defense Force managed road—a rare ritual nationwide. Call from the red phone box for passage permission before climbing to the secret slope.
primary.imgAlt: Red phone box on the defense road—JASDF gate adventure

secondary.title: Family powder
secondary.lead: Five compact courses with no risk of getting lost. Adult day pass ¥2,000, child ¥1,000—rentals ¥1,000 each, keeping island winter affordable.

rental.title:
Travel light to
island snow.
rental.lead: Ski or snowboard set ¥1,000, wear ¥1,000. Ferry visitors can drive from Ryotsu Port—bring your own hat and gloves.
rental.whisper: Proposed digital pass bundling lift, rental, and Kinpokunosato onsen—reducing cash-only counter friction.
rental.imgAlt: Rental desk at the lodge—visit without gear

tour.title:
Snow, onsen,
Sadomeshi.
tour.lead: Morning powder at Daira, afternoon soak at Kanai Onsen Kinpokunosato, evening Sadomeshi at Chozaburo or Kanai Seiyokan—a one-day island loop beyond the ski hill alone.
tour.imgAlt: Sado Island tour—gold mine, hot springs, local food

01.title: Ryotsu Port
01.body: Ferry from Niigata Port. Review defense road rules first

02.title: Secret runs
02.body: Climb with JASDF permission. Play on five courses

04.title: Sadomeshi
04.body: Chozaburo or Kanai Seiyokan—finish with island food

defense.title: Defense road access guide
defense.body: Call JASDF from the red phone box → get permission → climb per chain rules. Call again before descending; wait for a green signal at the gate. 4WD plus chains required in winter.

rentalGuide.title: Hands-free rental guide
rentalGuide.body: Boards and wear ¥1,000 each. No hats, gloves, or goggles for rent—stock up in Ryotsu or Niigata. Cash only at the counter (web pass proposed).

sadoTour.title: Sado snow · onsen · food model course
sadoTour.body: Daira skiing (AM) → Chozaburo lunch → Kinpokunosato onsen → Sado Kinzan or Toki Forest—pair UNESCO heritage tourism with snow in one day.

access.note: ~50 min by car from Ryotsu Port · JASDF permit required on defense road
access.places: 新潟県Niigata佐渡市Sado金井新保2-752-75 Kanai Shinbo
